news.title: Craftsman Automation exits Rc Green Powers Pvt. Ltd., holding no stake.
news.summary: Craftsman Automation exits Rc Green Powers Pvt. Ltd., holding no stake.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation's unit Sunbeam extends ₹28 Cr asset sale deal with Shriram Pistons to June 30, 2026.
₹10 Cr has been paid, with the remaining ₹18 Cr to be settled in tranches.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation's unit Sunbeam extends ₹28 Cr asset sale deal with Shriram Pistons to June 30, 2026.
₹10 Cr has been paid, with the remaining ₹18 Cr to be settled in tranches.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation invested Rs.39,500 in RC Green Powers, acquiring 2.63% stake.
Post-investment, total holding is 3.51%; may adjust shares per Electricity Act.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation invested Rs.39,500 in RC Green Powers, acquiring 2.63% stake.
Post-investment, total holding is 3.51%; may adjust shares per Electricity Act.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation extends asset sale deadline to 30 June 2026.
Rs. 28 Cr total consideration; Rs. 10 Cr received; buyer unrelated to promoters.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation extends asset sale deadline to 30 June 2026.
Rs. 28 Cr total consideration; Rs. 10 Cr received; buyer unrelated to promoters.

news.title:
Crisil reaffirms Craftsman Automation's long-term rating at Crisil AA/Stable and short-term at Crisil A1.
Strong business, healthy margins, and steady cash flows offset capex-driven temporary debt metric moderation.
news.summary:
Crisil reaffirms Craftsman Automation's long-term rating at Crisil AA/Stable and short-term at Crisil A1.
Strong business, healthy margins, and steady cash flows offset capex-driven temporary debt metric moderation.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation's board approved phased restructuring of its Aluminium Products business.
Plan includes amalgamation of subsidiaries, subject to shareholder, creditor, and regulatory approvals.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation's board approved phased restructuring of its Aluminium Products business.
Plan includes amalgamation of subsidiaries, subject to shareholder, creditor, and regulatory approvals.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation Ltd outperformed Sensex, delivering 102.1% returns in one year.
Strong financials, efficient management, and growth drive its multibagger status.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation Ltd outperformed Sensex, delivering 102.1% returns in one year.
Strong financials, efficient management, and growth drive its multibagger status.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation's Q3 earnings call highlighted aluminium margin impact from new plant startup.
Powertrain segment sees growth; Sunbeam restructuring targets focused growth and margin improvement.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation's Q3 earnings call highlighted aluminium margin impact from new plant startup.
Powertrain segment sees growth; Sunbeam restructuring targets focused growth and margin improvement.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation disclosed audio recordings of its Jan 29, 2026, earnings call.
The call covered unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9 months ending Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation disclosed audio recordings of its Jan 29, 2026, earnings call.
The call covered unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9 months ending Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation approved Q3 and nine-month unaudited results for Dec 2025, with no auditor qualifications.
The company plans a new Ludhiana plant with Rs. 60 Cr investment, 90% via loans, rest from internal accruals.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation approved Q3 and nine-month unaudited results for Dec 2025, with no auditor qualifications.
The company plans a new Ludhiana plant with Rs. 60 Cr investment, 90% via loans, rest from internal accruals.

news.title: Craftsman Automation's 9MFY26 EBITDA is ₹8.8B, below ₹11B full-year guidance.
news.summary: Craftsman Automation's 9MFY26 EBITDA is ₹8.8B, below ₹11B full-year guidance.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation's Q3 revenue rises to 20.6B INR, up from 15.7B INR YoY.
The company showcases strong operational growth with this significant revenue increase.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation's Q3 revenue rises to 20.6B INR, up from 15.7B INR YoY.
The company showcases strong operational growth with this significant revenue increase.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation executed an NSE block trade of ~37,797 shares at Rs. 7,824 each.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 29.57 crores.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation executed an NSE block trade of ~37,797 shares at Rs. 7,824 each.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 29.57 crores.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation Ltd's board meeting on 28th Jan 2026 to review Q3 FY25 financial results.
Trading window closed from 1st Jan 2026 until 48 hours post financial results announcement.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation Ltd's board meeting on 28th Jan 2026 to review Q3 FY25 financial results.
Trading window closed from 1st Jan 2026 until 48 hours post financial results announcement.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation finalizes asset sale to Shriram Pistons & Rings.
This move aligns with Craftsman's strategy to focus on core competencies.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation finalizes asset sale to Shriram Pistons & Rings.
This move aligns with Craftsman's strategy to focus on core competencies.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation invests Rs. 2.57 Cr in EG Solar Energix for 26% equity stake.
EG Solar operates in power generation; investment to complete by March 31, 2026.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation invests Rs. 2.57 Cr in EG Solar Energix for 26% equity stake.
EG Solar operates in power generation; investment to complete by March 31, 2026.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation's subsidiary approved converting 13.5 Cr CCPS and 37.6 Cr OCDs into equity.
Conversion increases subsidiary equity shares, but parent retains 100% ownership post-conversion.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation's subsidiary approved converting 13.5 Cr CCPS and 37.6 Cr OCDs into equity.
Conversion increases subsidiary equity shares, but parent retains 100% ownership post-conversion.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation acquired Suprash Developers and subsidiary Srikara Technologies for Rs. 145.85 Cr.
SPVs own 52.83 acres in Kancheepuram for a new plant; nil turnover till FY 2024-25.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation acquired Suprash Developers and subsidiary Srikara Technologies for Rs. 145.85 Cr.
SPVs own 52.83 acres in Kancheepuram for a new plant; nil turnover till FY 2024-25.

news.title:
Craftsman Automation's subsidiary to sell aluminum piston assets to Shriram Pistons for Rs. 28 Cr.
The non-related party transaction is expected to close by 31 March 2026.
news.summary:
Craftsman Automation's subsidiary to sell aluminum piston assets to Shriram Pistons for Rs. 28 Cr.
The non-related party transaction is expected to close by 31 March 2026.

news.title:
Crisil reaffirmed Craftsman Automation's credit ratings at CRISIL AA (Stable) for long-term and CRISIL A1 for short-term bank facilities.
The company's revenue grew 28% in FY25, driven by aluminum segment growth and contributions from its subsidiaries, DR Axion and SLSPL.
news.summary:
Crisil reaffirmed Craftsman Automation's credit ratings at CRISIL AA (Stable) for long-term and CRISIL A1 for short-term bank facilities.
The company's revenue grew 28% in FY25, driven by aluminum segment growth and contributions from its subsidiaries, DR Axion and SLSPL.
